description:
Configure a B2B wholesale pricing program. Create a Customer Group named 'Wholesale Buyers' with the 'Retail Customer' Tax Class and assign the customer 'john.smith@example.com' to it. Implement quantity-based tier pricing for this group on the following products:
- Business Laptop Pro (SKU: LAPTOP-001): 5 units for $849.99, 10 units for $749.99
- Wireless Headphones (SKU: HEADPHONES-001): 10 units for $119.99, 25 units for $99.99
- Insulated Water Bottle (SKU: BOTTLE-001): 50 units for $14.99, 100 units for $11.99

Login: admin / Admin1234!
